issues.description: Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' requires a 'cardType' parameter to specify what type of card to check for. The condition should be 'HasCardOnBoard' with cardType specified, or use 'LeaderHasAnyType' if checking leader types. Current condition is incomplete.

'multicolored Leader' appears to be checking for a multicolored leader on board. Should use LeaderHasAnyType or clarify if this is checking board state. If checking if YOUR leader is multicolored, use LeaderHasAnyType with appropriate color array.
